prompt: Create a dark gothic sci-fi fantasy portrait in a painterly, high-detail digital illustration style: a pale young woman or android princess with long silvery white hair reclines in a padded white medical throne, her face deliberately covered by a large flat neutral gray square censor block centered from forehead to chin. She wears an elaborate white ceremonial gown with frosted lace, metallic silver filigree, and two visible red jewel ornaments: one ruby set in a thorny silver crown across her forehead and one ruby brooch at the center of her chest. Behind her head, form a halo of jagged transparent crystalline branches, tangled cables, and icy metallic roots. The background is a black, wet, claustrophobic laboratory filled with reflective vertical pipes and hanging tubes. Include exactly 6 suspended glass syringe or IV capsule elements: one tall red-filled cylinder at the upper left, one small dark cylinder near the far left, one clear cylinder left of the head, one red-and-clear cylinder near the left side of the hair, one clear cylinder at the upper right, and one red-filled cylinder at the lower right edge. Use a cold monochrome palette of white, silver, charcoal black, icy blue highlights, and small crimson accents. Lighting should be dramatic and cinematic, with glossy reflections, damp surfaces, fine hair strands, intricate metal textures, and a melancholy sterile atmosphere. Composition is a wide 16:9 close portrait, subject centered, shoulders and upper torso visible, no text, no watermark.
